recommendations.title: Rab Ne Bana Di Jodi
recommendations.overview: A lonely 40-ish man, likely to remain a bachelor, has a chance to find the love of his life when he falls for a vivacious young woman.

recommendations.title: The Duchess
recommendations.overview: A chronicle of the life of 18th century aristocrat Georgiana, Duchess of Devonshire, who was reviled for her extravagant political and personal life.

recommendations.title: My Days of Mercy
recommendations.overview: The daughter of a man on death row falls in love with a woman on the opposing side of her family's political cause.

recommendations.title: Under the Amalfi Sun
recommendations.overview: A year after their romance began in Riccione, Vincenzo and Camilla reunite for a vacation on the picturesque Amalfi Coast and put their love to the test.

recommendations.title: Haider
recommendations.overview: A young man returns to Kashmir after his father's disappearance to confront his uncle - the man he suspects to have a role in his father's fate.

recommendations.title: "Wuthering Heights"
recommendations.overview: Tragedy strikes when Heathcliff falls in love with Catherine Earnshaw, a woman from a wealthy family in 18th-century England.

recommendations.title: The Three Deaths of Marisela Escobedo
recommendations.overview: After the death of her daughter at the hand of her boyfriend, Marisela Escobedo began to fight for justice not only against the murderer but also against the corrupt Mexican judicial system.

recommendations.title: Cartouche
recommendations.overview: In the 18th century, Louis de Bourguignon is working with the Malichot's gang, but their ways are too 'unethical' for him. He creates his own band, acting under the name of Cartouche, making audacious robberies of the rich people, and even distributi

recommendations.title: We Made a Beautiful Bouquet
recommendations.overview: Two people meet each other after missing the last train home, leading to a beautiful relationship over five years.

recommendations.title: Father and Daughter
recommendations.overview: A father says goodbye to his young daughter. In time the daughter grows old, but within her there is always a deep longing for her father.
